mechanics.excerpt: Street (21, Mercenary Brat (2) Clan War Orphan Events Caught in the attack that claimed your family [Choose one: Poor Vision (2), Combat Paralysis, Poor Hearing (3), Lost Limb (2)] Skipped orphanage-sponsored classes [WIL Language / Affiliation -1] Can't take anymore (Addiction] Used as slave Iabor by orphanage [Introvert; Escape Artist +1] Kicked out of the orphanage (Must take Street Path in Stage 2] Made the best of bad situation [Scrounge +1] Made friends with orphanage head [Contact] Trapped on Clan-held world for time (Streetwise_ Clan +2 Scrounge +2] Long ost relative takes you in [Wealth (21, may not choose Street Path in Stage Military-oriented orphanage teacher takes you as his pupil [Brawling Tactics /Infantry +1 may enter Military School desired in Stage 2] [Choose one event or roll twice and apply both results] Fugitlves Events Enemies targeted your family: you barely survived (Choose one: Combat Paralysis, Lost Limb (21, Poor Vision (21] Other kids mocked your fugitive status and made life in your adopted home miserable (Timid_ Introvert] Your parents' allies raised and supported you and they indoctrinated you with their political beliefs (In For Life] The faction opposed to your parent(s) includes you among its enemies [Enemy (20] Ran away from home ad fell in with local street toughs [Must take Street Path in Stage 2] Lived outside the League (Language/ Any +1] Made the best of bad situation and took t0 study [Academic / Any +21 Constantly on the move [G Tolerance , Interest/Any +1| You are trained t0 carry on the fight- (may enter Military School in Stage 2 ignoring prerequisites] Though exiles, your parents maintained many con: nections [Well-Connected] [Choose one event Or roll twice and appiy both resuits] FARM Like trillions of others who supply food to the thousands of human-occupied worlds you were born and raised on farm ranch 0r other rural food: producing enterprise.
